query: Apache Kafka vs Kinesis streaming platform comparison 2025

results.title: Kafka vs Kinesis: Which Streaming Platform is Right for You?
results.snippet: Apache Kafka and AWS Kinesis are the two most popular streaming platforms. Kafka offers higher throughput and a richer ecosystem, while Kinesis provides tighter AWS integration and a simpler operational model.

results.title: Kinesis vs Kafka: A Detailed Comparison
results.snippet: Kinesis Data Streams on-demand mode scales automatically to handle any amount of data, while Kafka requires manual shard or partition management.

query: Confluent Cloud Schema Registry IoT event streaming

results.title: Confluent Cloud Schema Registry — Official Docs
results.snippet: Confluent Schema Registry provides a serving layer for your metadata. It provides a RESTful interface for storing and retrieving Avro, JSON Schema, and Protobuf schemas.

query: AWS Kinesis Data Streams on-demand mode throughput limits

results.title: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Quotas and Limits
results.snippet: In on-demand mode, Kinesis Data Streams instantly accommodates your workloads as they ramp up or down. The default limit is 200 MB/s write and 400 MB/s read per data stream.
